title: Skylens
description: A Hypixel Skyblock mod for 1.21.10/1.21.11 that focuses on unique features and customizability.
body:
![# Skylens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af8cedf649628d9f4ce17908cddc91ef15710eb1.png) A 1.21.10/1.21.11 Hypixel Skyblock mod for Fabric, adding features usually related to UI. ## Features
Pet Overlay 🐶
  • The main feature, which is used to display the current progress to the next and max level of the pet. Highly configurable.
Pressure Display 🌊
  • Displays the pressure level when entering the Galatea waters.
Missing Enchantments 🧰
  • Shows a list of any missing enchantments the current hovered item has in its tooltip.
Drill Fuel Meter ⛽
  • Meter, which indicates the current fuel level of the drill the player holds.
Dungeon Score Meter 🏰
  • Shows dungeon score with visible bounds of each rank.
Compact Level Display 📊
  • Minimizes the format for displaying the pet's level.
Low HP Indicator ❤️
  • Gradually reddens the screen as the player's health drops.
## Issues Use the [issue tracker](https://github.com/nextrg/SkylensKotlin/issues) found in the mod's github page to submit new features, report bugs or give feedback on the mod.
